---
title:  "Adopting CourseKata for Math 338 @ CSUF"
date:   2026-05-13 11:17:00 -0700
categories: 
  - Course-Material
  - WebR-Tool
---

## CSUF Statistics using CourseKata
Thanks to a grant from the [Gates Foundation](https://www.gatesfoundation.org/), we piloted using [CourseKata's](https://www.coursekata.org/) innovative approach to teaching statistics in [CSUF](fullerton.edu). 

Materials provided in [CSUF_Stat_CK](https://manabdoli.github.io/CSUF_Stat_CK/) are produced to facilitate this adoption. Presentation slides use `WebR` to allow interactive R coding in browser.
